info.title: CluedIn REST API — Administration & configuration
info.description: Cluster settings, admin commands, index commands, configuration, logging, and metered billing.

get.description: Returns the available `LoggingEnvironmentPreset` values (Development, Staging, Production, etc.). Admin-only.
Returns the available `LoggingEnvironmentPreset` values (Development, Staging, Production, etc.). Admin-only.
Returns the configurable runtime log-level switches that overrides can target. Admin-only.
Returns the configurable runtime log-level switches that overrides can target. Admin-only.

get.summary: Get current runtime log level overrides
get.description: Returns the active runtime log-level override configuration (preset and/or per-switch overrides) plus its expiration time. Admin-only.

get.summary: Get current runtime log level overrides
get.description: Returns the active runtime log-level override configuration (preset and/or per-switch overrides) plus its expiration time. Admin-only.

post.description: Sets a runtime log-level override (preset, switch overrides, or both) with a positive lifetime. The override expires automatically after `Lifetime`. Returns 400 when `Lifetime` is non-positive or neither preset nor switch overrides are supplied. Admin-only.

Sets a runtime log-level override (preset, switch overrides, or both) with a positive lifetime. The override expires automatically after `Lifetime`. Returns 400 when `Lifetime` is non-positive or neither preset nor switch overrides are supplied. Admin-only.
Removes the active runtime log-level override and reverts the cluster to its default configuration. Admin-only.
Removes the active runtime log-level override and reverts the cluster to its default configuration. Admin-only.
Convenience endpoint to apply a `LoggingEnvironmentPreset` with a lifetime expressed in minutes (defaults to 60). Returns 400 for non-positive lifetimes or unknown preset values. Admin-only.
Convenience endpoint to apply a `LoggingEnvironmentPreset` with a lifetime expressed in minutes (defaults to 60). Returns 400 for non-positive lifetimes or unknown preset values. Admin-only.

get.description: Queues an ad-hoc deduplication run for the requested entity or scope. Used for support troubleshooting outside the deduplication-projects flow.
Queues an ad-hoc deduplication run for the requested entity or scope. Used for support troubleshooting outside the deduplication-projects flow.
Queues a deduplication pass scoped to a single entity.
Queues a deduplication pass scoped to a single entity.
Queues an organisation-wide ad-hoc deduplication pass. Heavy operation — only used for support investigations.
Queues an organisation-wide ad-hoc deduplication pass. Heavy operation — only used for support investigations.
Diagnostic endpoint that aggregates an entity's parent records. Used by support engineers to investigate entity-graph anomalies.
Diagnostic endpoint that aggregates an entity's parent records. Used by support engineers to investigate entity-graph anomalies.

get.summary: Admin: trigger external search for entity
get.description: Triggers an external-search/enrichment pass for the supplied entity using the configured enrichers.

get.summary: Admin: trigger external search for entity
get.description: Triggers an external-search/enrichment pass for the supplied entity using the configured enrichers.

post.summary: Admin: resync entity across data stores
post.description: Triggers a resync of a single entity across all secondary data stores.

post.summary: Admin: resync entity across data stores
post.description: Triggers a resync of a single entity across all secondary data stores.
Triggers a resync of all secondary data stores (graph, search, blob) from the primary data store.
Triggers a resync of all secondary data stores (graph, search, blob) from the primary data store.

get.description: Queues a reprocessing pass for a single entity.
Queues a reprocessing pass for a single entity.
Queues a full reprocessing pass over all entities.
Queues a full reprocessing pass over all entities.

get.summary: Admin: process all entities of type
get.description: Queues a reprocessing pass for every entity of the supplied entity type.

get.summary: Admin: process all entities of type
get.description: Queues a reprocessing pass for every entity of the supplied entity type.

get.summary: Admin: create missing mesh records by entity type
get.description: Creates missing target-side mesh records for every entity of the supplied type.

get.summary: Admin: create missing mesh records by entity type
get.description: Creates missing target-side mesh records for every entity of the supplied type.
Synchronises missing target-side mesh records across the organisation.
Synchronises missing target-side mesh records across the organisation.

get.summary: Admin: sync missing mesh records for entity
get.description: Synchronises missing target-side mesh records for a single entity id.

get.summary: Admin: sync missing mesh records for entity
get.description: Synchronises missing target-side mesh records for a single entity id.

get.summary: Admin: create missing mesh records by entity id
get.description: Creates missing target-side mesh records for a single entity id.

get.summary: Admin: create missing mesh records by entity id
get.description: Creates missing target-side mesh records for a single entity id.

post.description: Splits one data part off an entity into its own entity, useful for diagnosing merges.
Splits one data part off an entity into its own entity, useful for diagnosing merges.
Splits a single entity into its constituent data parts.
Splits a single entity into its constituent data parts.

get.description: Queues a split-entity pass for every entity of the supplied type. Used to reverse a bad merge across many entities.
Queues a split-entity pass for every entity of the supplied type. Used to reverse a bad merge across many entities.

post.description: Inserts an item into the admin memory store (used for ad-hoc support state).
Inserts an item into the admin memory store (used for ad-hoc support state).
Re-sends a queued insight command for an entity.
Re-sends a queued insight command for an entity.
Re-sends all entities through the processing pipeline.
Re-sends all entities through the processing pipeline.
Resets cached account information for the organisation.
Resets cached account information for the organisation.
Clears cached/derived user state for the current organisation. Useful when a user account is in an inconsistent state.
Clears cached/derived user state for the current organisation. Useful when a user account is in an inconsistent state.
Loads a CSV file into the organisation as part of an admin import. Used for support data-loading scenarios.
Loads a CSV file into the organisation as part of an admin import. Used for support data-loading scenarios.

get.description: Returns the raw provider configuration record from the configuration repository — typically used for debugging an integration.
Returns the raw provider configuration record from the configuration repository — typically used for debugging an integration.
Returns the agents (workers) registered with the cluster, used by the admin tooling to inspect processing capacity.
Returns the agents (workers) registered with the cluster, used by the admin tooling to inspect processing capacity.

post.description: Backfills the `OriginEntityCodes` collection on entities — used after data-model migrations.
Backfills the `OriginEntityCodes` collection on entities — used after data-model migrations.

get.description: Re-publishes outgoing-hook events for every entity that has custom hooks defined.
Re-publishes outgoing-hook events for every entity that has custom hooks defined.
Queues a reprocessing pass over edges for a single entity.
Queues a reprocessing pass over edges for a single entity.

get.description: Queues a reprocessing pass over edges for entities of the supplied type.

get.description: Queues a reprocessing pass over edges for entities of the supplied type.
Returns the configured identity counters and their state.
Returns the configured identity counters and their state.

get.summary: Admin: get next identity counter id
get.description: Returns the next id from an identity counter (advances the counter).

get.description: Returns the next id from an identity counter (advances the counter).

get.summary: Admin: get unique identity counter id
get.description: Returns a guaranteed-unique id from an identity counter.

Returns currently held id reservations on an identity counter.

Queues processing of the metrics that apply to a single entity.

get.description: Queues processing of entity metrics across all entities.

get.description: Queues processing of entity metrics across all entities.

get.description: Queues processing of entity metrics for every entity of the supplied type.

get.description: Queues processing of entity metrics for every entity of the supplied type.

post.description: Publishes a `FullRemapAndReIndex` event to trigger a complete reindex across the organisation. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.
Publishes a `FullRemapAndReIndex` event to trigger a complete reindex across the organisation. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

get.description: Returns the change history for the supplied provider definition.
Returns the change history for the supplied provider definition.
Returns paged provider definitions filtered by status, name, owner, and include/exclude type lists.
Returns paged provider definitions filtered by status, name, owner, and include/exclude type lists.
**Deprecated** — use `GET /api/v1/configuration/providers?status=Inactive`.

post.description: Adds an owner to a provider definition.

put.description: Updates an owner entry for a provider definition.

delete.description: Removes an owner from a provider definition.

get.description: Returns the owners (users/teams) of provider definitions.

delete.description: Removes an owner from a provider definition.

Returns the agent jobs associated with provider configurations (typically crawl jobs).

get.summary: List provider memberships for current user
get.description: Returns the provider definitions the calling user has access to.

get.summary: List provider memberships for current user
get.description: Returns the provider definitions the calling user has access to.

get.summary: List provider memberships for a user
get.description: Returns the provider definitions a specific user has access to.

get.summary: List provider memberships for a user
get.description: Returns the provider definitions a specific user has access to.
Returns the user account memberships on provider definitions. (Note: the spelling `providefinition` rather than `providerdefinition` is preserved from the original route definition.)

post.description: Adds a user-account membership to a provider definition.

delete.description: Removes a user-account membership from a provider definition.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook registration associated with a provider configuration.
Deletes a webhook registration associated with a provider configuration.

get.description: Returns paged configurations (provider definitions) for the organisation. Multiple overloads exist that accept different filter shapes; consult the in-code controllers for the specific combinations supported on your deployment.

Returns paged configurations (provider definitions) for the organisation. Multiple overloads exist that accept different filter shapes; consult the in-code controllers for the specific combinations supported on your deployment.
Returns the configuration identified by name (typically a provider definition lookup).
Returns the configuration identified by name (typically a provider definition lookup).
Returns the count of provider definitions matching the supplied filters (same filters as `GET /api/v1/configuration/providers`).
Returns the count of provider definitions matching the supplied filters (same filters as `GET /api/v1/configuration/providers`).
Returns all provider definitions visible to the caller. Lightweight alternative to `/providers` when filtering isn't needed.
Returns all provider definitions visible to the caller. Lightweight alternative to `/providers` when filtering isn't needed.

post.description: Resolves dynamic option lists for extended configuration UI controls (for example dropdowns whose options depend on other field values). The server iterates registered `IExtendedConfigurationProvider` implementations until one can handle the request. Returns 404 when no provider can handle the request and 400 on validation failures.

Resolves dynamic option lists for extended configuration UI controls (for example dropdowns whose options depend on other field values). The server iterates registered `IExtendedConfigurationProvider` implementations until one can handle the request. Returns 404 when no provider can handle the request and 400 on validation failures.

post.summary: Resolve a single extended configuration option
post.description: Resolves a single extended configuration option by value (used to render the selected option's label without re-fetching the full option list). Returns 404 when no provider can handle the request.

post.summary: Resolve a single extended configuration option
post.description: Resolves a single extended configuration option by value (used to render the selected option's label without re-fetching the full option list). Returns 404 when no provider can handle the request.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Optional starting offset (inclusive). When omitted, the server reads from `lastOffset - 999`.

get.description: Returns the most recent application logs for the organisation by reading from the RabbitMQ log stream. With no `offset`, returns the last ~1000 entries; supply `offset` to continue from a previous read. The response is `{ consoleMessages: [...] }`. Requires the OrganizationalAdmin role.

post.description: Writes a log message into the server's logger with the supplied severity. The endpoint mainly exists so the UI can ship client-side errors back to the backend logger. Returns 200 with `"Logged"`. Note: any authenticated user can post; treat the logger as untrusted input.

Writes a log message into the server's logger with the supplied severity. The endpoint mainly exists so the UI can ship client-side errors back to the backend logger. Returns 200 with `"Logged"`. Note: any authenticated user can post; treat the logger as untrusted input.
Creates a new user setting. Returns 202 Accepted when the setting has been persisted; 400 with validation details when the model is invalid.

put.description: Updates a user setting if a setting with the same key already exists for the caller; otherwise creates it. Returns 202 Accepted.

get.description: Returns the user-level settings stored for the calling user. Includes the organisation and user identifiers on each entry.

post.description: Creates a new user setting. Returns 202 Accepted when the setting has been persisted; 400 with validation details when the model is invalid.

put.description: Updates a user setting if a setting with the same key already exists for the caller; otherwise creates it. Returns 202 Accepted.

get.description: Returns the user-level settings stored for the calling user. Includes the organisation and user identifiers on each entry.
